# Context

Given I am on Add exporter details page for any Fes journey and the exporter address has not been added as of yet (for instance using ECC) and if I leave fields blank, the correct error warnings should be triggered

**Expected:** The user is expected to enter the company name and add the exporter’s address

**Actual:** An error of “Enter a postcode” appears. There is no field to enter postcode on the page, therefore the error message does not seem suitable

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1 - Updated error message displayed if no address added on this page

- Given I have navigated to `/add-exporter-details`
- When I have not added an address
- And I press Save and continue
- Then the error displayed should be “Add the exporter’s address”

**Technical note:** 
- The address may come already prpulated we need to replicate the situation as described above. The esiest way to replicate this is set hasAddress to false, temporarly on `app/composite-components/addExporterDetailsComponent.tsx` line 29
- Currently there isn't validation in place for the address, which normally this comes from backend as other fields
- `hasAddress` does not have any value then a paragraph is displayed see line 178 at `addExporterDetailsComponent.tsx` asking user to add the exporter address. It is this case senario when we need to provide validation on save and continue button to display the error message "Add the exporter’s address" if there is no address added
- Check if we already have validation in place on the backend, mmo-fes-orchestration, and add validaion on the fronend too


### Scenario 2 - Postcode error only displayed when on screen where postcode field exists
- Given I have navigated to `/add-exporter-details`
- When I have navigated through to Add address
- And I have left the postcode field blank
- And I press Find address
- Then the error displayed should be “Enter a postcode”

### Scenario 3 - Welsh translation for Add exporter address error

- Given I have navigated to `/add-exporter-details`
- When I have selected Welsh language
- Then the error “Add the exporter’s address” is translated to Welsh

| English text | Welsh translation |
| --- | --- |
| Add the exporter’s address | Ychwanegu cyfeiriad yr allforiwr |
